description: Expand the existing encrypted container '/home/ga/Volumes/project_archive.hc' from 10MB to 50MB. The container password is 'ArchivePass2024'. Ensure all original files inside remain intact. After expansion, mount the volume, verify the data, and create a new file inside named 'expansion_verified.txt' containing the text 'Volume expansion successful'. Finally, create a report at '/home/ga/Documents/expansion_report.txt' listing the new size and available free space, then dismount the volume.
